p37_note: Network seeded at GLOW 123. Seth and Russell have productive tension: Russell wants the funnel to pull the user forward; Seth wants the user to pull themselves forward. When both voices are present in a review, the resulting tutorial earns each step rather than engineering it. Seth and Alex Hormozi also have tension: Alex wants the offer to be irresistible; Seth wants the offer to be earned. The tension produces offers that are both irresistible AND trusted.
